message:
feat(layout,showcase): add pane semantic replay harness and expand WASM showcase runner

Layout:
- Add pane semantic replay harness and test fixtures for deterministic
  replay-based pane operation testing
- Expand pane.rs and lib.rs with replay support hooks

Showcase WASM:
- Update Cargo.toml dependencies and expand runner_core/wasm modules
  for improved showcase rendering pipeline

Scripts:
- Update pane_e2e.sh with new test scenarios

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -60,8 +60,8 @@ pub use direction::{FlowDirection, LogicalAlignment, LogicalSides, mirror_rects_
 pub use ftui_core::geometry::{Rect, Sides, Size};
 pub use grid::{Grid, GridArea, GridLayout};
 pub use pane::{
-    PANE_DRAG_RESIZE_DEFAULT_HYSTERESIS, PANE_DRAG_RESIZE_DEFAULT_THRESHOLD,
-    PANE_EDGE_GRIP_INSET_CELLS, PANE_MAGNETIC_FIELD_CELLS,
+    PANE_DEFAULT_MARGIN_CELLS, PANE_DEFAULT_PADDING_CELLS, PANE_DRAG_RESIZE_DEFAULT_HYSTERESIS,
+    PANE_DRAG_RESIZE_DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, PANE_EDGE_GRIP_INSET_CELLS, PANE_MAGNETIC_FIELD_CELLS,
     PANE_SEMANTIC_INPUT_EVENT_SCHEMA_VERSION, PANE_SEMANTIC_INPUT_TRACE_SCHEMA_VERSION,
     PANE_SNAP_DEFAULT_HYSTERESIS_BPS, PANE_SNAP_DEFAULT_STEP_BPS, PANE_TREE_SCHEMA_VERSION,
     PaneCancelReason, PaneConstraints, PaneCoordinateNormalizationError, PaneCoordinateNormalizer,

@@ -338,6 +338,7 @@ run_traceability_step() {
 
 if $RUN_TERMINAL; then
     run_step "pane_terminal_layout_resize_smoke" "terminal" bash "$PROJECT_ROOT/tests/e2e/scripts/test_layout_composer_resize.sh" || true
+    run_step "pane_layout_semantic_replay_harness" "terminal" "${CARGO_RUNNER[@]}" test -p ftui-layout --test pane_semantic_replay_harness -- --nocapture || true
 
     if [[ "$MODE" != "smoke" ]]; then
         run_step "pane_terminal_action_timeline_full" "terminal" bash "$PROJECT_ROOT/tests/e2e/scripts/test_action_timeline.sh" || true
